mapper.sql: id , run_no, engine, engine_instance_id, process_definition_id, flow_version_id, trigger_id, trigger_key, idempotency_key, idempotency_scope, business_key, correlation_key, parent_run_id, root_run_id, retry_from_run_id, retry_no, retry_reason, tenant_id
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, flow_id, run_no, engine, engine_instance_id, process_definition_id, flow_version_id, trigger_id, trigger_key, idempotency_key, idempotency_scope, business_key, correlation_key, parent_run_id, root_run_id, retry_from_run_id, retry_no, retry_reason, version_no, trigger_type, status, input_summary, output_summary, error_message, started_at, finished_at, elapsed_ms FROM hb_flow_run WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE hb_flow_run SET run_no = #{values.runNo}, engine = #{values.engine}, engine_instance_id = #{values.engineInstanceId}, process_definition_id = #{values.processDefinitionId}, flow_version_id = #{values.flowVersionId}, trigger_id = #{values.triggerId}, trigger_key = #{values.triggerKey}, idempotency_key = #{values.idempotencyKey}, idempotency_scope = #{values.idempotencyScope}, business_key = #{values.businessKey}, correlation_key = #{values.correlationKey}, parent_run_id = #{values.parentRunId}, root_run_id = #{values.rootRunId}, retry_from_run_id = #{values.retryFromRunId}, retry_no = #{values.retryNo}, retry_reason = #{values.retryReason} WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}

UPDATE hb_flow_run_event SET event_seq = #{values.eventSeq}, engine_activity_id = #{values.engineActivityId}, execution_id = #{values.executionId}, task_id = #{values.taskId}, source_node_id = #{values.sourceNodeId}, target_node_id = #{values.targetNodeId}, edge_id = #{values.edgeId}, token_id = #{values.tokenId}, attempt_no = #{values.attemptNo}, selected_ports = #{values.selectedPorts}, input_payload_ref = #{values.inputPayloadRef}, output_payload_ref = #{values.outputPayloadRef}, event_summary = #{values.eventSummary}, error_code = #{values.errorCode} WHERE id = #{id} AND tenant_id = #{tenantId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM hb_flow_run WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id IN #{id}

SELECT id, event_seq, engine_activity_id, execution_id, task_id, source_node_id, target_node_id, edge_id, token_id, attempt_no, selected_ports, input_payload_ref, output_payload_ref, event_summary, error_code FROM hb_flow_run_event WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id IN #{id}
